name: Living Legend
description: 20th-level Oath of Glory feature. You can empower yourself with the legends—whether true or exaggerated—of your great deeds. As a bonus action, you gain the following benefits for 1 minute: You are blessed with an otherworldly presence, gaining advantage on all Charisma checks. Once on each of your turns when you make a weapon attack and miss, you can cause that attack to hit instead. If you fail a saving throw, you can use your reaction to reroll it. You must use this new roll. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a long rest, unless you expend a 5th-level spell slot to use it again.

mechanics.description: When you make a weapon attack and miss, you may cause that attack to hit instead.
If you fail a saving throw, you can use your reaction to reroll it and must use the new roll.
